data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-part MIME support, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-part MIME, but there are no specific details or evidence indicating that this requirement has been implemented or tested. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify multi-part MIME support.
